entity.summary: Cross-chain decentralized exchange protocol for native asset swaps across multiple blockchain networks.
entity.notes: The mainnet swap application and supporting protocol interfaces remain available. The Chainflip AMM source row is treated as a protocol surface under this parent entity.

evidence.title: Chainflip mainnet swap application
evidence.notes: First-party mainnet application links to liquidity provision and the protocol explorer.

evidence.title: Chainflip exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory corroborates the cross-chain DEX identity and current trading activity.
